author: Jdthomas24
description: Advanced Hubitat battery monitoring with analytics, trends and replacement tracking. Recurring scan schedule, confidence-weighted health, EWMA smoothing.
releaseNotes: v2.5.25 - New: Bulk Actions in Device Battery Management — log battery replacements or reset drain history across multiple devices in one shot. Includes per-device result summary and 60-second cooldown guard to prevent accidental back-to-back runs.
